name: R Dev Container
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'Rscript -e "install.packages(c(\"devtools\", \"usethis\", \"pak\", \"renv\"), repos=\"https://cran.rstudio.com/\")" && npx --yes skills add cedanl/.github --skill "*" -a claude-code -a opencode -y --copy -g && echo "[ -f /workspaces/r-devcontainer/.devcontainer/.env ] && set -a && source /workspaces/r-devcontainer/.devcontainer/.env && set +a" >> ~/.bashrc'
